title: PM Domain Review Gate And SQL Readiness Checklist
objective: Create the final PM-domain review gate and readiness checklist that determines when the schema work can move from bounded authority design into implementation-ready SQL planning.
constrained_outputs: One review gate and readiness checklist under c:/APEX Platform/Platform-Authority
Explicit implementation-ready criteria and unresolved-decision list
validation_steps: Confirm all prerequisite packet outputs exist
Confirm unresolved platform-boundary questions remain explicit
Confirm SQL remains gated until checklist conditions are satisfied
Confirm the next implementation-ready packet must still carry unresolved-decision, validation-plan, and write-scope artifacts required by the finalization protocol
